h2s: AI in Graphic Design: Keeping the Human Touch
h3s: How to turn one-off browser utilities into a repeatable workflow
Clean image handoffs: compress, convert, extract, repeat
Writing faster without making every page feel generic
Color work that moves from idea to export without tab chaos
UTM links that marketing teams can actually audit later
DNS and redirects: the quiet checks before a launch
Ratio checks before publishing responsive graphics
Pulling usable image assets from existing pages
